metadata.description: Personal, hand-vetted collection of Claude skills.

plugins.name: git-commit
plugins.description: Run quality checks and draft a Conventional Commits message, then commit staged changes.

plugins.name: fix
plugins.description: Structured bug diagnosis and resolution — no code changes until root cause is confirmed.

plugins.name: setup
plugins.description: Initializes .claude/ infrastructure (CLAUDE.md, rules, skills, hooks) for any project. Includes a companion refresh skill for keeping docs in sync as code evolves.
